mapper.select: select id, document_id, revision_no, base_revision, title, content, is_snapshot, editor_id, editor_name, change_type, change_summary, created_at from collaborative_document_revision where document_id = #{documentId} order by revision_no desc limit #{limit}

select id, document_id, revision_no, base_revision, title, content, is_snapshot, editor_id, editor_name, change_type, change_summary, created_at from collaborative_document_revision where document_id = #{documentId} and revision_no <= #{revisionNo} and is_snapshot = 1 order by revision_no desc limit 1

select id, document_id, revision_no, base_revision, title, content, is_snapshot, editor_id, editor_name, change_type, change_summary, created_at from collaborative_document_revision where document_id = #{documentId} and revision_no > #{fromRevisionExclusive} and revision_no <= #{toRevisionInclusive} order by revision_no asc limit #{limit}
